scenarios.description: clone() returns a distinct Document instance with identical content and baseUri
scenarios.expectedResult: returned Document is not the same instance as original; returned.baseUri() == "http://example.com"; returned.html().equals(doc.html()) == true
pseudocode: TEST TC01 clone returns deep copy

scenarios.description: clone() produces independent outputSettings and parser clones such that modifying original does not affect clone
scenarios.precondition: Document doc = Document.createShell("/base"); // default settings; then modify outputSettings and parser clones
scenarios.expectedResult: after clone, changing doc.outputSettings().charset to UTF-16 and parser().setTrackErrors(10) does not change copy.outputSettings().charset (remains default UTF-8) and copy.parser().getTrackErrors() == 0
pseudocode: TEST TC02 clone independence of mutable fields
